title: Incorrect Memoization in Coin Change Problem

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: Input is a list of coin denominations and the target sum, where n is the number of coin denominations and m is the target sum.
statement.outputFormat: The function should return the number of ways to obtain the target sum using the given coin denominations.
statement.notes: The function should use dynamic programming to solve the problem efficiently.

hints.text: Check the memoization table to ensure it is being used correctly.

editorial.title: Incorrect Memoization in Coin Change Problem
editorial.intuition: The problem can be solved using a dynamic programming approach with memoization.
editorial.optimalSolution: The optimal solution is to use a dynamic programming approach with memoization to keep track of the number of ways to obtain each possible sum.
